channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 3%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer has ‘full confidence’ in Streeting despite health secretary’s allies saying he is planning to resign – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer has ‘full confidence’ in Streeting despite health secretary’s allies saying he is planning to resign – UK politics live

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour politicians should put the country before their party | Letters
item.description: Labour politicians should put the country before their party | Letters

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting-Starmer latest: PM cracks joke about Labour turmoil in Commons as leadership challenge looms
item.description: Streeting-Starmer latest: PM cracks joke about Labour turmoil in Commons as leadership challenge looms

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): King’s speech might be the last word on Starmer as reluctant monarch does his duty | John Crace
item.description: King’s speech might be the last word on Starmer as reluctant monarch does his duty | John Crace

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I don't know how many different ways I can say this but I'm not stepping aside for Andy Burnham, and it's both very tedious for me and very demoralising for my staff to keep seeing it reported that I might be about to...
item.description: I don't know how many different ways I can say this but I'm not stepping aside for Andy Burnham, and it's both very tedious for me and very demoralising for my staff to keep seeing it reported that I might be about to...

item.title: i Politics: EU under-30s' visa and trade deal face delay as Labour implodes
item.description: EU under-30s' visa and trade deal face delay as Labour implodes

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I think it's v hard to call if 'Starmer's Cabinet is frankly not very good' is true on not, for similar reasons that it would be hard to assess who in the Arsenal squad was any good if you were only allowed to use 'th...
item.description: I think it's v hard to call if 'Starmer's Cabinet is frankly not very good' is true on not, for similar reasons that it would be hard to assess who in the Arsenal squad was any good if you were only allowed to use 'th...

item.title: FT UK Politics: Who do gilt investors want to lead Britain?
item.description: Who do gilt investors want to lead Britain?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Reform councillor who said Holocaust was a ‘hoax’ quits party days after being elected
item.description: Reform councillor who said Holocaust was a ‘hoax’ quits party days after being elected

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I really think people politics need to read a fucking book or something. *Ed Miliband* would be an unusually junior person to replace Starmer as Prime Minister. A non-cabinet minister is certainly not going to do it, ...
item.description: I really think people politics need to read a fucking book or something. *Ed Miliband* would be an unusually junior person to replace Starmer as Prime Minister. A non-cabinet minister is certainly not going to do it, ...
